a:r.a:t: Detailed insights by lever codifies the opportunity and guides the path to value capture
Independent deep-dives on each commercial lever
Double-clicks into each of the 6 key commercial levers
Optimize pricing to align margins with product revenue contribution
Optimize prices or lower discounts for lower revenue customers
Align prices for products where costs increased faster than prices
Adjust prices for customers that are price insensitive to non-key value items
Identify magnitude of customer churn by type of churn
Identify most likely next-to-sale products for given customer
